'''Denia''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] who served the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] and the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] as a [[Jedi General/Legends|General]] in the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], despite her advanced age.

==Biography==
A [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]], Denia was discovered by the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] and [[Jedi training/Legends|educated]] in the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] within the [[Jedi academy|academy]] at the [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]]. Eventually attaining the rank of [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] after much study and contemplation of the Force as a [[Jedi Diplomat|diplomat]], Denia became one of the few Jedi to achieve the rank of [[Jedi Sage|Sage Master]]. Taking the Human male [[Valin Draco]] as her [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]], she taught him all she knew of the Force. Denia, middle-aged for a Jedi, reported to [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] when the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] erupted between the Republic and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]]. Already at an advanced age for a Human, Denia dutifully took up the rank of [[Jedi General/Legends|General]] in the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] and led [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] against the [[Separatist Droid Army/Legends|Separatist Droid Army]].<ref name="AWH" />

Surviving until the last year of the war, Denia was contacted by Master [[Ashka Boda]], who was searching for Jedi to assist in setting up a secret network that would lead Jedi who survived the Separatist attack on [[Almas]] back to Coruscant.<ref name="EOJ">{{DoD|Echoes of the Jedi}}</ref> Denia was assigned to [[Cato Neimoidia/Legends|Cato Neimoidia]], where she would serve under [[Jedi High Council/Legends|High Council member]] [[Plo Koon/Legends|Plo Koon]] during the [[Battle of Cato Neimoidia/Legends|battle]] for the planet. During the fighting, Denia was rendered unconscious on the battlefield after a [[Vulture-class starfighter/Legends|Vulture droid]] crashed near her. Her form was discovered by a [[General/Legends|general]] in the Separatist Army, who drugged her and had her body carried to a nearby [[Darga the Hutt's palace|palace]]. Not long after, the Clone Wars ended suddenly, with the slaughter of the [[Separatist Council/Legends|Separatist Council]] and the reorganization of the Republic into the victorious [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. On the losing end of the war, the Separatists fled the palace and Cato Neimoidia, leaving Denia in an artificial coma within its walls.<ref name="AWH" />

Soon after the war, the palace that housed Denia was occupied by [[Darga Jiramma Mionne|Darga]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] and [[Darga's organization|his minions]]. Locating Denia, the Hutt decided to keep the middle-aged woman as a bargaining tool should need ever arise and had her moved to the subbasements, where [[Igren Demos]] kept her comatose. During the months surrounding Darga's reign in the palace, a band of anti-Imperial freedom fighters infiltrated Darga's palace on assignment for [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Bail Prestor Organa/Legends|Bail Organa]] of the [[Imperial Senate/Legends|Imperial Senate]]. Reaching out to the rebels through the Force, Denia directed them to her location despite being in a coma. Deactivating the machines keeping her in a coma, the rebels woke Denia, who thanked them for their assistance. Filling her in on the fall of the Republic and the [[Great Jedi Purge/Legends|dissolution of the Jedi Order]], the group headed upstairs to find that Darga had fled upon news of Denia's escape. Overhearing Demos' conversation with an Imperial [[Inquisitorius/Legends|Inquisitorius]] member via the [[HoloNet/Legends|HoloNet]], the group escaped the palace and took Denia to the [[Resurgence (EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate)|''Resurgence'']] to receive medical treatment.<ref name="AWH" />

Aboard the ship, Denia was healed and approached by Senator Organa with the proposition of joining his secret movement known as the [[Alderaanian Resistance]]. Accepting the offer, Denia was determined to bring down Darga the Hutt and his devious plot known as the [[Sarlacc Project]]. Going into deep meditation, Denia found the Force muddled and her ability to [[Force vision/Legends|foresee]] diminished. Deciding that a [[Holocron/Legends|holocron]] would boost her abilities, Denia and her allies planned a trek that would take them to the ruins of the [[Almas Academy]] in the [[Cularin system/Legends|Cularin system]]. While Denia believed that many of the artifacts were probably stolen, the Force was drawing her to the world, and using the coordinates obtained by Senator Organa, Denia dispatched her comrades to the ruins.<ref name="EOJ" />

Upon their return with the [[Qornah Holocron]], Denia was disturbed by reports that Valin Draco was alive, now an Inquisitor of the Empire, and responsible for attacking the group. Going into a deep trance, she set her comrades on another mission regarding the Sarlacc Project.<ref name="EOJ" /> While in meditation, the ''Resurgence'' was [[Battle of the Resurgence|attacked and destroyed]]. Denia, surviving the attack, was taken prisoner by her former Padawan, Valin Draco. Imprisoned on the [[Deep Core/Legends|Deep Core]] world [[Prakith/Legends|Prakith]], Denia was held deep within the [[Citadel Inquisitorius]] by Draco, who quickly grew tired of torturing the old Jedi Master. Refusing to give away any information regarding Organa's organization, Denia was nearly comatose when her rebel allies broke into the Citadel and located her chamber. Strapped to the torture rack, Denia appeared helpless to do anything as Draco attempted to destroy her before taking out her allies. However, she deflected Draco's bursts of [[Force lightning/Legends|Force lightning]] back into him and unleashed a powerful Force attack that allowed her companions to escape. Her great strength expended in this encounter cost her her life, yet she willingly sacrificed it to save Organa's men and their cause.<ref name="GOA">{{DoD|The Gem of Alderaan}}</ref>
